items.name_en: 🔥 Mini soft grained calfskin Pebble Bucket Tote Pebble 👜 Merges pure minimalist lines with eye-catching design style 💄 Creating a unique and innovative handbag design. items.name_en: Classic Calfskin Hammock Flip Handbag
items.name_cn:
Classic Calfskin Hammock Flip Handbag
Model 33705
The Hammock Flip handbag interprets a classic style with soft texture and practical function, while continuing the series' signature details. Featuring creative stitching and a flip structure, it easily converts from a shoulder bag to a close-fitting Hobo bag. This version is crafted from classic calfskin.
Can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, or carried by hand
Detachable and adjustable shoulder strap
Magnetic snap closure
One external zip pocket, two internal slip pockets
Herringbone cotton canvas lining
LOEWE hot-stamped or silver-plated
Dimensions 15-22-21
.

Detachable and adjustable shoulder strap
Magnetic snap closure
One external zip pocket, two internal slip pockets
Herringbone cotton canvas lining
LOEWE hot-stamped or silver-plated
Dimensions 15-22-21
.
